body:
Peter,

Fundraising is always important with a campaign, but it's
particularly important we reach our goal today. Why?

Tonight, we'll close the books on our first quarterly report of
the campaign -- that report will be made public and will be
viewed by many - prospective donors, the media, etc. - as a key
performance indicator of our campaign.

This campaign is about fighting for the American Dream and
ensuring a new American Century - something worth fighting for.
So click here to help us meet our goal of raising $100,000 for
our "Let Freedom Ring" money bomb.

Remember! Literally any amount will make a difference and count
towards our overall participation goal. Whether it's $7 or $70 -
your donation is important!

The most important thing is you give today!

Thanks for your help.

--Marco

Fellow Conservative:

There are just over 12 hours until the deadline for my End of Quarter Money Bomb.

Without a strong fundraising quarter, I'm afraid the media may anoint another candidate from the mushy middle who faces certain defeat.

**[So I'm counting on you to stand with me by chipping in a contribution of $20.16 before the midnight deadline](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28744320:27624745636:m:1:879035888:2B5A6B3DC7E7B3939EFFE0108F2CC5C2:r)**.

The left-wing press has been trying to destroy my campaign from day one because polls show me leading Hillary Clinton in must-win states like Colorado, Iowa, New Hampshire, Ohio, and Pennsylvania.

So they have been trying to hammer home the narrative that 2016 will be decided between two of yesterday's candidates bickering over whose "turn it is" to manage Big Government.

Fellow Conservative, I've prepared a special video message explaining why conservatives should send a message that the voters - and not the liberal media - pick our party's nominee.

name: Ben Carson
subject: I've got two very specific goals
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28746354:27626130183:m:1:876315805:96C046233FDF97A430C387F0D733F29B:r)
---

**Peter -- I need your help to accomplish two very specific goals. **

One, because I am not a career politician and have never run for office, we must share my story with the American people. To help do this, we've released an exclusive, easy-to-read short book on my life, based upon my best seller _Gifted Hands_. It's simply called _My Life_.

And two, the second fundraising quarter closes at midnight tonight, and we're extremely close to crossing 200,000 donations. This would be an historic achievement in just 16 weeks.

[**If you will contribute $25 or more to help us cross 200,000 donations before the deadline, we'll send you a copy of _My Life_ to read and share with your friends and family.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28746354:27626130183:m:1:876315805:96C046233FDF97A430C387F0D733F29B:r)
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28746354:27626130183:m:1:876315805:96C046233FDF97A430C387F0D733F29B:r)
---
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28746354:27626130183:m:1:876315805:96C046233FDF97A430C387F0D733F29B:r)
---
I know that I've asked a lot of you recently, but I wouldn't be asking if it wasn't vitally important to the future of this campaign.

A recent article about the 2016 race noted that "while the spotlight has been on opponents like former Florida governor Jeb Bush and Senator Marco Rubio, Carson has been quietly building a grassroots following."

This is exactly right -- and much of it has to do with word of mouth. Supporters just like you are talking to their friends, family and neighbors, and sharing my story and my common sense solutions.

[**This new book will be a huge help as you work to spread the word, and your donation today will help us to continue "quietly building our grassroots following" in all 50 states.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28746354:27626130183:m:1:876315805:96C046233FDF97A430C387F0D733F29B:r)

Thank you for everything.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |

name: Jeb Bush
subject: This is why I am running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc
body:
Friend,

I'll be blunt, I need your help. **There are only 15 hours left until our end of quarter deadline, and every contribution you make right now is being matched by a group of donors.** This is our first major deadline as a campaign, and all eyes are on us.

[**So, Friend, will you contribute $100, $50, or $25 right now? **](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/vhkbdkyzmghnrcrfnktbmnqcyynqzcdzbkjkhzcjrfy_nprddjkw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

I want to take my positive, conservative vision to all voters in America.

I'm running on my record of cutting more than $19 billion in taxes and creating 1.3 million new jobs as Governor of Florida.

I'm running on my plan to grow our national economy and create millions of new jobs as President of the United States.

I'm running for America to take command of our future once again.

**Are you with me?**

[**Please, chip in whatever you can right now, and the amount will be doubled by a group of generous donors.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ddmkzrjwsmcfgbgtfrnksflbjjflwbzwkrdrcwbdgpg_nprddjkw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

The stakes are high, Friend, and I need you with me to stop Obama's third term with Hillary. America deserves better.

I will campaign as I will serve, and I am running to win. I hope you're with me. Together, we will restore the promise of this great country.

Jeb

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/tmmfsbprjcvkwtwlkbgfjkdtppkdrtsrfbmbvrtmwzl_nprddjkw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

body:
Fellow Conservative:

This is it.

With just hours left until the midnight FEC fundraising deadline, I'm counting on your IMMEDIATE action.

We've raised over $712,550 during this End of Quarter Push so far. But it's absolutely critical we reach our one million dollar goal.

A big day today will prove to the media and the Big Government political establishment of BOTH parties that you and I have the grassroots support to match all those poll numbers showing me leading Hillary Clinton in key presidential swing states.

**[So won't you please agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28753367:27635755695:m:1:879035888:7C360F13955198A8150A907540846152:r)**?

And then, if at all possible, please forward this email to everyone you know as well.

Fellow Conservative, I'm not going to mince words. If you and I are going to succeed in finally taking our country back from the Big Government crowd in BOTH parties, we're going to have to fight like never before.

For months now, the media has been spouting off predictions that November 2016 will be a contest between two candidates with yesterday's last names pushing yesterday's failed Big Government policies.

But the truth is, our country can't afford any more of the status quo under either party.

Not with over $18 TRILLION in national debt. Not with our Executive Branch and our U.S. Supreme Court dismantling what's left of our constitutional freedoms.

That's why I'm counting on your action TODAY.

A big fundraising quarter will help show the American people stand solidly behind my bold plans for REAL reform, including:

*** Cutting taxes and spending. My 14.5% flat-rate tax plan would drive a stake through the heart of the IRS, return $2 TRILLION to the American people, and create 1.4 million new jobs;

*** Ending the reign of career politicians by passing term limits;

*** Forcing members of Congress to read the bills they vote on -- instead of springing last-minute thousand page bills on the American people that are laden with handouts to those with the best lobbyists;

*** Repealing ALL of ObamaCare. Every last word of this horrendous government takeover of our healthcare;

*** Auditing the Federal Reserve;

*** Protecting the entire Bill of Rights -- including the Second Amendment, our right to religious liberty, the God-given right to life, and our right to privacy from government snooping.

But Fellow Conservative, the media is ready to pounce. So are Big Government members of BOTH parties.

They want to wipe my limited government ideas off of the political map to pave the way for a future filled with nothing but higher taxes, more government spending, more waste and more government control over every aspect of our lives.

**[So please agree to your most generous gift of $20.16 or more right away to help my campaign reach our million dollar goal by midnight](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28753367:27635755695:m:1:879035888:7C360F13955198A8150A907540846152:r)**.

And then forward this email to everyone you know.

Fellow Conservative, time is running out. There are just hours left.

So please act at once.

Are you with me? I need your help today. | Friend --

We’ve set a goal of **[50,000 grassroots donations before tonight’s fundraising deadline.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjI5NTAwNjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgyOTQ0ODQzS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

This race is about something bigger than all of us: the country we love, the people we hold dear, and the future we want to build together.

name: Danny Diaz
subject: You heard the boss
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc
body:
Friend,

This is it, you heard what the Governor said. Our first report.

Our opponents will be poring over our end of quarter filings to identify weaknesses. They'll extrapolate predictions based on sums. The media will salivate, eager for a story. And our other Republican friends in the race will puff their chests. But Jeb's the candidate with the real record. He's got the best record of any one in this race, BAR NONE.

[**We need you now. Please donate $25, or more. As the boss mentioned, right now, every contribution is being 100% matched.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/jtmhctnkfmvwspsbwtdhfwzpnnwzkpckhtqtvkpqbrn_sksmmlpj.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

We need the best showing possible. [**We need $2,307 before midnight tonight to meet our goal. But I don 't want to meet it, I want to beat it. Please, chip in right this moment, anything you can afford, before our first deadline.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/bqbkvjzmbqgydndpyjtkbysnzzysmnvmkjcjgmncpfd_sksmmlpj.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1) And send to your friends, ask them to chip in too.

Jeb's counting on us. Let's show our strong start.

Thanks,

Danny Diaz
Campaign Manager
Jeb 2016, Inc.

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ufcbvgckmfnsyjyhsgdbmszjccszkjvkbgpgnkjphwh_sksmmlpj.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

**-- Begin Forwarded Message--
From: Jeb Bush
Date: June 30, 2015
Subject: Midnight tonight**
Danny,

I'll be blunt, I need your help. **There are only 12 hours left until our end of quarter deadline, and every contribution you make right now is being matched by a group of donors.** This is our first major deadline as a campaign, and all eyes are on us.

[**So, Danny, will you contribute $100, $50, or $25 right now? **](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/fgqztbylrnjwqpqdwbfzrwcpyywclptlzbgbjlpgdhs_sksmmlpj.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

I want to take my positive, conservative vision to all voters in America.

I'm running on my record of cutting more than $19 billion in taxes and creating 1.3 million new jobs as Governor of Florida.

I'm running on my plan to grow our national economy and create millions of new jobs as President of the United States.

I'm running for America to take command of our future once again.

**Are you with me?**

[**Please, chip in whatever you can right now, and the amount will be doubled by a group of generous donors.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/bcpkvjzmbqgydndpyjtkbysnzzysmnvmkjcjgmncpff_sksmmlpj.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

The stakes are high, Danny, and I need you with me to stop Obama's third term with Hillary. America deserves better.

I will campaign as I will serve, and I am running to win. I hope you're with me. Together, we will restore the promise of this great country.

Jeb

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ezsljtqwphbfdcdrftklpfvcqqfvwcjwltztbwczryt_sksmmlpj.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Let me be frank
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
Let me be frank with you, friend: a successful presidential campaign is a massive undertaking, and ours will be heavily outspent.
The billionaire class already controls most of our economy, and now they have their sights set on the presidency. Their super PACs are already running ads against our campaign.
Tonight we have a chance to send a message right back to them in a language they're sure to understand.
When the clock strikes midnight, we close the books on our first official FEC fundraising deadline.
It's a declaration of the money our campaign has raised to-date, and more importantly, the number of contributors that make up that total.
[**Add your first $3 contribution to our campaign before tonight 's deadline and send a powerful message that you have had enough of the billionaire class buying elections.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2024/43f17890/5f8013f0/621d9741/3051585459/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-political-revolution?refcode=em150630am-nd-ab-w")
When people look at our public FEC report, I want them to see every single contribution as a demonstration of support for the values we share: **health care as a basic right** for all Americans, access to a **free, high-quality public education** , and an **end to the insatiable greed of the billionaire class**.
We've received over 200,000 contributions in support of that message so far. It's important that you add yours before midnight.
Let's rock the boat,
Bernie Sanders
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2024/43f17890/5f8013f0/621d9741/3051585459/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-political-revolution?refcode=em150630am-nd-ab-w")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE

name: Jeff Weaver, Bernie 2016
subject: "I've never contributed to a campaign before"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
Friend -
Every day, hundreds of messages come into campaign headquarters from supporters, volunteers, contributors, and people who just want to share what Bernie's vision for America's future would mean in their lives.
We read each and every one of them because real change is only possible when large numbers of ordinary Americans make their voices heard and get involved in the political process.
[**I wanted to share a few of them with you in the hopes that they 'll inspire you to make your first $3 contribution to our campaign before tonight's critical FEC fundraising deadline.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb202a/43f17890/5ff0698a/621d95d3/1755069672/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-political-revolution?refcode=em150630c-stories-pm1-L-nd")
**From People Who Made Their First Political Contribution Ever:**
"I want you to know this. I live on Social Security. The amount is $784 a month. I generally run out of money before the end of the month. I do not contribute to ANYTHING. This is my first political contribution for as long as I can remember. I am sorry it's only $5, and I'm afraid it will also have to be my last as I have to survive in this economy. Use it wisely. LOL." - S. from Oregon
"Thank you for taking on this challenge for us. I have never contributed to a person's campaign in my life but I believe in what you stand for." - R. from California
"I am 51 years old. Today I made the first political contribution of my entire life because I truly believe in what Bernie Sanders stands for. I challenge you to do the same!" - Anonymous
[**For the supporters across the country who believe in Bernie 's message so much that they gave to our campaign for the first time ever, add your first $3 contribution before tonight's critical FEC fundraising deadline.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb202a/43f17890/5ff0698a/621d95d3/1755069672/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-political-revolution?refcode=em150630c-stories-pm1-L-nd")
**The People Who Gave But Could Hardly Afford To:**
"I truly believe we need Bernie for our next president. I wish I could donate more but I'm a new widow getting used to the idea of how far one Social Security check will go." - S. from West Virginia
"My husband and I agree with everything you have said in your letter. We intend to contribute next week when our SS check comes in. We live on a limited income but feel strongly that we must support you for a change in the politics and governing of our country. I wish it could be more." - M. & M. from Washington
"I survive on a fixed income (SSD) but I will continue to donate monthly because I have been watching and waiting for you to represent America as our POTUS for many years. If you win (IMO) we will finally have the representation that has been all but forgotten by so many fear-filled Americans. That will be one of the greatest days in modern history. Another FDR just when I thought all was lost. I wish you and America all of the best. My grown children will actually see the America that made me so proud in my youth." - M. from Tennessee
"I already contributed $100 and have medical bills to cover from an operation and I need hearing aids, so at this time I cannot afford to contribute more. I wish I could. I don't place bumper stickers on my car but I will place Bernie's sticker proudly on it." - J. from New York
[**For the people who wish they could contribute more, add your first $3 contribution to our campaign before tonight 's critical FEC fundraising deadline.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb202a/43f17890/5ff0698a/621d95d3/1755069672/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-political-revolution?refcode=em150630c-stories-pm1-L-nd")
**And Those Who Desperately Wish They Could Contribute, But Just Cannot Afford It:**
"I wish I had the money to donate to your cause Bernie, I really do. Right now my family is going through very hard times and as of yesterday we are completely broke, with absolutely no money. However, if there is anything else I can do to help with your campaign, just let me know." - C. from Arizona
"I wish I could donate. I'm disabled and on limited income. Sorry. $5 means no food at the end of the month. I am going to vote for Bernie." - D. from Alabama
"Dang, I wish I had some extra cash. I'm on SSDI and struggling as it is. I am going to register to vote, though. First time since 1971, and as long as I keep seeing your campaign taking the high road, my vote will most likely go to you." - S. from Tennessee
"As much as I believe in you and want to donate, I can't. I get less than $500 a month from Social Security and have no money. None. I can't even pay my monthly bills and when something breaks down, I can't fix it. I'm sorry." - C. from Florida
[**For the people who wish they could contribute but just can 't afford it, add your first $3 contribution to our campaign before tonight's critical FEC fundraising deadline.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb202a/43f17890/5ff0698a/621d95d3/1755069672/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-political-revolution?refcode=em150630c-stories-pm1-L-nd")
You can see why these stories are such a source of inspiration for Bernie, and for everyone on the team.
I hope they've inspired you to help move our campaign forward by making your first campaign contribution ahead of tonight's FEC fundraising deadline.
All the best,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb202a/43f17890/5ff0698a/621d95d3/1755069672/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-political-revolution?refcode=em150630c-stories-pm1-L-nd")

subject: 5 smooth stones
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Huckabee for President
body:
When the boy David stood before Goliath he had only his faith in God and 5 smooth stones. Five stones to take down the Philistine champion who towered over the Israelites. Our campaign is David standing before Goliath. And our ideas and founding principles are our smooth stones. We are challenging the Washington to Wall Street axis of power that has forsaken for too long the families and taxpayers of this country in favor of their own schemes to accumulate wealth and power. These same groups will spend hundreds of millions of dollars to fight back against our ideas, our principles and in some cases even our faith in God. Regardless, I believe we can win the GOP presidential nomination and go on to defeat Hillary Clinton. To succeed though we need to fight back against the attacks that will surely come our way because we are threatening this axis of power. [That is why I hope you will make an immediate contribution of $50 or more today](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjU5MzMtODA5ZWM4YmEtMGZmYy00ZjFlLThhZDctNzFmYWEzMDBhZTBmDQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDAzOWM3NzdhDQpodHRwczovL3d3dy5taWtlaHVja2FiZWUuY29tL2RvbmF0ZT9zPThTNzINCnRydWUNCmRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29t). Your response before midnight is critical. I’ve sent this email to top supporters and if everyone contributes $50 we will raise the money we need to reach our online goal before our deadline at midnight. This is the most important fundraising goal we have set yet, so reaching this goal is a top priority for our entire campaign. I know you are committed to my campaign for President – [I am asking you to redouble your support with a $50 donation today](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjU5MzMtODA5ZWM4YmEtMGZmYy00ZjFlLThhZDctNzFmYWEzMDBhZTBmDQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDAzOWM3NzdhDQpodHRwczovL3d3dy5taWtlaHVja2FiZWUuY29tL2RvbmF0ZT9zPThTNzINCnRydWUNCmRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29t). Stand with me against Goliath and let us use our 5 smooth stones to win. Mike Huckabee P.S. If you feel more comfortable, donating by mail please send your donation to the address below: Huckabee for President
